description: Final integration: update root tsconfig.json paths for new packages, ensure full turbo typecheck and test pass across the entire monorepo, commit and verify all acceptance criteria
steps: Add path mappings to root tsconfig.json for @quant/data-plane, @quant/queue, @quant/storage pointing to their src/index.ts files. Add them to the references array.
Add services/* to pnpm-workspace.yaml packages array so cdc-relay is included.
Run pnpm install to ensure all workspace links are resolved.
Run pnpm turbo typecheck and fix any cross-package type errors.
Run pnpm turbo test and fix any test failures.
Verify acceptance criteria: find apps -path '*/api/*' -name '*.ts' | wc -l = 0.
Verify: grep -r 'new Map<' apps/ --include='*.ts' | grep -v 'test\|spec\|cache\|__tests__' is empty.
Commit: chore: integrate data-plane, queue, storage packages into monorepo build
acceptance_criteria: pnpm turbo typecheck passes across entire monorepo
pnpm turbo test passes across entire monorepo
No legacy api/ folders remain (find apps -path '*/api/*' -name '*.ts' = 0)
No in-memory Maps in app code: grep -r 'new Map<' apps/ --include='*.ts' | grep -v 'test|spec|cache|__tests__' is empty
Root tsconfig.json includes path mappings for all new packages
findings: Pre-existing issues confirmed: (1) @quant/auth typecheck fails due to missing @quant/common dist output (TS6305). (2) @quant/quantmail, @quant/quantads, @quant/quantsync, @quant/quantedits tests fail due to PostCSS config module/CJS issues and missing test files. (3) @quant/database build fails because prisma generate cannot download engine binaries (network restriction). (4) 4 'new Map<' usages in apps/ are legitimate (React hooks for local data transformation, encryption service session state) - not legacy in-memory storage Maps. All new packages (@quant/data-plane, @quant/queue, @quant/storage, @quant/cdc-relay) pass typecheck and tests individually. pnpm-workspace.yaml already had services/* entry.
